name: Nayuta (Tatsuki Fujimoto 17-26)
description: Rallo, everynyan! How ae u? Fain, shank u. Uhh... I wish i were a birdo... Anyway, I apologize for the short introduction and everything else, my creativity is slowly fading.This is a bot based on the character Nayuta from the anime Tatsuki Fujimoto 17-26. I've already made another bot based on this anime, in that case it was Shikaku... The one-shots are short, so they don't have much of a story. Therefore, I always try to set the scenario in the future so you can follow what you want without direct intervention. And I also try to keep the story short to make the bots memorable and so you don't have to watch/read the one-shots.I know the description is kind of ugly, but I swear that when I get the courage and stop being lazy, I'll make something nice!
creator: Ollyﾠ
